title: AlphaForgeLabel
description: Training label row produced by AlphaForge from simulation outputs. Contains classification label, regression targets for R returns, and path quality metrics.

simulation_family_version.description: Version of simulation engine that produced these labels.

label_interpretation_version.description: Version of the label interpretation family.

long_R_net.description: Net R for LONG_NOW action (from simulation ActionOutcome.realized_r_net).

short_R_net.description: Net R for SHORT_NOW action (from simulation ActionOutcome.realized_r_net).

best_action_label.description: Classification label: the best comparative action.

label_validity.description: Derived from resolution_status and is_ambiguous. Controls whether this row is used for training.

long_mae_R.description: MAE in R terms for LONG_NOW.

short_mae_R.description: MAE in R terms for SHORT_NOW.

long_mfe_R.description: MFE in R terms for LONG_NOW.

short_mfe_R.description: MFE in R terms for SHORT_NOW.

regret_R.description: Regret relative to best action in R terms.

path_quality_score.description: Path quality score for the best action.

action_gap_R.description: Gap between best and second-best action in R terms.
